description: A sales representative needs to set up the contact structure for a new multinational prospect. Establish a hierarchical contact structure starting with the parent company 'Nexus Global Industries' (Type: Company, Address: 500 Park Avenue, New York, NY 10022, United States, Phone: +1 212-555-0100, Website: https://www.nexusglobal.example.com). This parent company has two subsidiaries: 'Nexus Global - Europe' (Type: Company, Address: 45 Moorgate, London, EC2R 6AN, United Kingdom) and 'Nexus Global - Asia Pacific' (Type: Company, Address: 2-3-1 Nihonbashi, Chuo-ku, Tokyo 103-0027, Japan). Additionally, include individual contacts: 'Elena Rossi' (Job Position: VP of Sales EMEA, Email: elena.rossi@nexusglobal.example.com, Phone: +44 20 7946 0958) associated with the Europe subsidiary, and 'Kenji Tanaka' (Job Position: Regional Director APAC, Email: kenji.tanaka@nexusglobal.example.com, Phone: +81 3-1234-5678) associated with the Asia Pacific subsidiary. Ensure all parent-child relationships are correctly established between the companies and individuals.
